title: Fresh Session Test probe in grooming hunt
action: Per D7: grooming's Hunt Checklists gain a Fresh Session Test probe — five questions each mapped to its artifact: what is this system -> docs/specs/system-overview.md; how is it organized -> docs/specs/reading-map.md; how do I run it / verify it -> .bee/config.json commands; where are we now -> bee_status. Any unanswerable question files a backlog item naming the missing artifact. CREATION-LOG note citing docs/09 item 4.

truths: Probe is a checklist block, not a new skill step

trace.outcome: Five-question probe with artifact table added to Hunt Checklists; run-don't-read rule for the verify question; CREATION-LOG pressure scenario (stat-not-read = RED).
